final_root_cause: demo-probe was intentionally deployed in a restart loop for the replay campaign; Prometheus restart metrics increased in demo-apps and Loki showed repeated demo-probe heartbeat lines during the incident window.
effective_actions: rollback or replace the intentionally crashing demo-probe workload
verify kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total for namespace demo-apps returns to baseline
confirm Loki demo-probe logs stop repeating during the recovery window
